# allowsActions

**Instance Property**

Determines whether to display buttons for actions such as sending a text message or initiating a FaceTime call.

## Declaration

```swift
var allowsActions: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

By default the value of this property is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true].

## Customizing Contact Card

- **allowsEditing**: Determines whether the user can edit the contact’s information.
- **shouldShowLinkedContacts**: Determines whether to display data from contacts that are linked to the contact being displayed.
